title: tricholaena microstachya
intro: Tricholaena microstachya, commonly known as the wire grass, is a perennial grass species native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tricholaena microstachya include its potential to treat various ailments such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, it has been prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
